prompt: Use image 1 as the identity, costume, rendering-style, and scale anchor. Create a single 2x2 character spritesheet showing the same adventurer in four cardinal directions with maximum consistency between panels. The sheet must contain exactly four full-body standing idle poses, one per cell, all at the same scale and centered in their own quadrants. Reading order must be: top-left = North/back view, top-right = East/right-facing side view, bottom-left = South/front view, bottom-right = West/left-facing side view. Preserve the same dark tousled hair silhouette, red scarf, blue tunic, brown belts and pouches, gloves, boots, and single shoulder pauldron, adapting those details correctly to each direction. Keep the same character proportions, line weight, palette family, and shading style across all four views. Make this read like a game-ready direction sheet, not four different reinterpretations. Use a clean exact flat chroma green background #00FF00 across the entire sheet, with no gradient, no shadows, no floor, no texture, no labels, no text, and no borders.
